---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a grainsizeR improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Use Case

Describe the workflow or reporting need.

## Sedimentological or Soil-Texture Context

Explain the sedimentology, grain-size, particle-size fraction, soil texture, or
texture ternary plot context.

## Proposed API

Describe the function name, arguments, and output you would expect.

## Source or Method Reference

If this is a scientific method request, provide primary official or academic
references.

## Texture Polygon Coordinates

Does this request involve texture polygon coordinates? If yes, describe the
primary source and provenance status.

## Classification Scope

Does this request involve civil-engineering classification systems? These are
outside the current package scope unless explicitly accepted in a future design
decision.
